rationale.R1.1: Any substantive reaction to this artifact requires reconstructing its contribution claim: chemistry-agnostic model-free SoH estimation via TCN+attention on raw telemetry. This framing is a precondition for evaluating anything else.
rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is centrally implicated: the paper asserts chemistry-agnosticism yet relies on IC-peak locations tied to graphite-anode staging transitions — a chemistry-specific physical phenomenon. Whether this internal tension is fatal or benign is a load-bearing judgment call under 'what do you think.'
rationale.R1.3: Performance claims (1.8% RMSE, transfer without retraining) are stated but the artifact provides no confidence intervals, test-set sizes, or experimental protocol details sufficient to assess whether the numbers are credibly supported — a natural axis of critique.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is plausibly the primary intent of 'what do you think': whether the TCN+attention architecture, the IC-peak auxiliary token design, or the cross-chemistry transfer claim represent genuine advances over Richardson et al. and contemporaneous work is a central question a domain reader would pose.
